body.title: Inhibition layer infrastructure
body.result: inhibition_chain.py with TWMCheckNode (live) + 3 stub gates; basket threaded through code_ref dispatch in main.py; 12 tests pass
body.description: Build inhibition layer between BG selection and tool execution. Steps: (1) verify basket form in existing code; (2) cognition/inhibition_chain.py — InhibitionChain DAG with TWM check (temporal-aware) + inference/estimate/action-gate stubs, each returns (inhibited, reason); (3) basal_ganglia.py MEDIUM — invoke chain after selection, inhibition writes reason to basket; (4) main.py MEDIUM — thread basket through execution, attach basket to resulting memory metadata as provenance. Tests: tests/test_inhibition_chain.py. Logging: inhibition decisions to cognition.log. Out of scope: memory/models.py, BG scoring, tool registry, brainstem/. First test case: PROC_WHAT_TIME. Decisions: D246-D249. Size: L.
